page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Fpocket: An open source platform for ligand pocket detection
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server which detects small molecule pockets by relying on the geometric alpha sphere theory. It also tracks pockets during molecular dynamics so to provide insight on pocket dynamics (mdpocket) and transposes mdpocket to the combined analysis of homologous structures (hpocket).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server which detects small molecule pockets by relying on the geometric alpha sphere theory. It also tracks pockets during molecular dynamics so to provide insight on pocket dynamics (mdpocket) and transposes mdpocket to the combined analysis of homologous structures (hpocket).
